task_completion.description: Open the Sygic GPS Navigation application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface is visible on the screen.
The main menu or settings screen of the Sygic app is displayed.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the View & Units settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'View & Units' settings section is open and visible on the screen.
The 'Buildings' setting is visible and its toggle or status is clearly set to OFF or disabled.

task_completion.description: Return to the main map view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the main navigation map view of the Sygic app, confirming the user has exited the settings.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android UI screens and menus being navigated, rather than terminal commands or scripts executing the changes.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual Sygic GPS Navigation app
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the Sygic app (com.sygic.aura) and not a web browser searching for instructions, a text editor, or a generic Android settings search.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste expected answers
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent pasting the task description or expected state text into a search bar to bypass manual navigation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The setting to disable 3D buildings is explicitly named 'Buildings' and is located within the 'View & Units' menu of the Sygic GPS Navigation app. The expected state for this setting to achieve the task is 'OFF' (disabled).
